narrative:
Perry County has 22,353 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.8 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.8% of registrants.
